subtitle.en: Choose the right security product for each threat
subtitle.zh: 幫每個威脅選對的安全產品

tagline.en: Match each threat to the right shield.
tagline.zh: 幫每個威脅配上對的盾牌。

scenario.en: Your website is getting hit with SQL injection and other malicious requests. What blocks them?
scenario.zh: 你的網站一直被 SQL injection 和各種惡意請求攻擊，要用什麼擋下來？

why.en: A Web Application Firewall (WAF) inspects HTTP requests and blocks SQLi, XSS, and other common attacks.
why.zh: WAF（Web 應用防火牆）會檢查 HTTP 請求，擋下 SQLi、XSS 等常見攻擊。

scenario.en: You want to stop bots from abusing a signup form, but you hate making real users solve annoying puzzles.
scenario.zh: 你想擋掉機器人灌爆註冊表單，又不想讓真人去解惱人的圖形驗證。

why.en: Turnstile is a privacy-friendly CAPTCHA replacement that verifies humans, usually with no puzzle at all.
why.zh: Turnstile 是注重隱私的 CAPTCHA 替代方案，通常不用解任何題目就能驗證是真人。

scenario.en: You just launched a site over plain HTTP and want free HTTPS to encrypt visitor traffic.
scenario.zh: 你剛上線的網站只有 HTTP，想要免費的 HTTPS 來加密訪客流量。

why.en: Cloudflare's SSL/TLS issues free certificates and encrypts traffic between visitors and your site.
why.zh: Cloudflare 的 SSL/TLS 會發放免費憑證，加密訪客與網站之間的流量。

scenario.en: Staff need to reach an internal admin dashboard based on their identity — without rolling out a clunky VPN.
scenario.zh: 員工需要依身分存取內部管理後台，又不想架設笨重的 VPN。

why.en: Cloudflare Access enforces Zero-Trust, identity-based access to internal apps — no VPN required.
why.zh: Cloudflare Access 提供 Zero Trust、以身分為基礎的內部應用存取，不需要 VPN。

scenario.en: You want to filter employees' outbound DNS and web traffic, blocking malware and phishing sites.
scenario.zh: 你想過濾員工對外的 DNS 和網頁流量，擋掉惡意軟體和釣魚網站。

why.en: Cloudflare Gateway is a secure web gateway that filters outbound DNS, HTTP, and network traffic for your team.
why.zh: Cloudflare Gateway 是安全網頁閘道，幫團隊過濾對外的 DNS、HTTP 與網路流量。

scenario.en: You want to expose a service running on your laptop to the internet without opening any firewall ports.
scenario.zh: 你想把跑在自己筆電上的服務公開到網際網路，又不想開任何防火牆連接埠。

why.en: Cloudflare Tunnel creates an outbound-only connection, exposing a local service with no open inbound ports.
why.zh: Cloudflare Tunnel 建立只對外的連線，讓本地服務公開卻不用開任何對內連接埠。

scenario.en: A flood of traffic from thousands of IPs is trying to knock your website offline.
scenario.zh: 來自上千個 IP 的大量流量正試圖把你的網站打掛。

why.en: Cloudflare's DDoS protection absorbs and mitigates volumetric floods to keep your site online.
why.zh: Cloudflare 的 DDoS 防護會吸收並緩解大流量攻擊，讓網站持續上線。

scenario.en: Visitors can post comments, and an attacker is injecting <script> tags to run XSS on other users.
scenario.zh: 訪客可以留言，攻擊者卻塞入 <script> 標籤，想對其他使用者發動 XSS。

why.en: The WAF's managed rules detect and block cross-site scripting (XSS) payloads in requests.
why.zh: WAF 的代管規則會偵測並擋下請求中的跨站腳本（XSS）攻擊內容。

scenario.en: Traffic reaches Cloudflare over HTTPS, but the hop from Cloudflare to your origin server is still unencrypted. How do you encrypt it end to end?
scenario.zh: 流量以 HTTPS 連到 Cloudflare，但 Cloudflare 到你來源伺服器這段還沒加密。要怎麼做到端到端加密？

why.en: Setting the SSL/TLS encryption mode to Full (Strict) encrypts and validates the connection all the way to your origin.
why.zh: 把 SSL/TLS 加密模式設成 Full（Strict），就能一路加密並驗證到來源伺服器的連線。
